title: Macchiato - Catppuccin
description: 🎨 Catppuccin Macchiato GUI – A texture pack that recolors all Minecraft interfaces with the Macchiato palette from Catppuccin for a soft and harmonious vibe! 💜☕
body:
🌿 **Catppuccin Macchiato GUI – Minecraft Texture Pack** 🎨  

A texture pack that applies the **Macchiato** palette from **Catppuccin** to all Minecraft graphical interfaces (GUI). Enjoy a soft and elegant atmosphere with harmonious colors that are easy on the eyes while preserving the game's original aesthetic. Perfect for a more pleasant and immersive visual experience! 💜☕
